test.name: select_from_1rel_indirect1_alias
test.input: select a from b.c as d

node.text: select a f..m b.c as d
select a f..m b.c as d

test.name: select_from_into_2rel
test.input: select a into b from c, d

node.text: select a i.. from c, d
select a i.. from c, d

test.name: select_from_1rel_group1
test.input: select a from b group by 1

test.name: select_from_1rel_window_empty
test.input: select a from b window c as ()

test.name: select_from_1rel_window_partition1
test.input: select a from b window c as (partition by d)

test.name: select_from_1rel_window_partition1_rows_unbounded
test.input: select a from b window c as (partition by d rows between unbounded preceding and unbounded following)

test.name: select_from_1rel_window_partition1_rows_1preceding_current
test.input: select a from b window c as (partition by d rows between 1 preceding and current row)

test.name: select_from_1rel_2windows
test.input: select a from b window c as (partition by d range between current row and 1 following), e as (partition by f)

test.name: select_distinct_on_from_1rel
test.input: select distinct on (a) a from b

test.name: with_2ctes_select3
test.input: WITH a AS (SELECT 1), b AS (SELECT 2) SELECT 3

test.name: with_recursive_2ctes_select3
test.input: WITH RECURSIVE a AS (SELECT 1), b AS (SELECT 2) SELECT 3

test.name: select_a_orderby_b_c
test.input: select a order by b, c

node.text: select a o..er by b, c
select a o..er by b, c

test.name: select_a_orderby_b_c_directions
test.input: select a order by b asc, c desc

test.name: select_a_orderby_b_c_directions_nulls
test.input: select a order by b asc nulls first, c desc nulls last

test.name: select_table_ref
test.input: select 1 into b; select 1 from b;

test.name: select_column_ref
